channel.title: CJEU IP case law
channel.description: Latest CJEU IP case law: preliminary rulings, referrals, appeals

item.title: [Ruling] C-797/23 (Meta Platforms Ireland)
item.description: [Ruling] 12 May 2026, C-797/23 (Meta Platforms Ireland) Type: Judgment - Copyright > DSM Directive > Article 15 - Protection of press publications concerning online uses CURIA: https://curia.europa.eu/juris/liste.do?num=C-797/23

item.title: [Ruling] C-127/24 (VHC 2 Seniorenresidenz)
item.description: [Ruling] 30 Apr 2026, C-127/24 (VHC 2 Seniorenresidenz) Type: Judgment - Copyright > InfoSoc Directive > Article 3 - Right of communication to the public CURIA: https://curia.europa.eu/juris/liste.do?num=C-127/24

item.title: [Ruling] C-132/25 (M.M. Ristorazione)
item.description: [Ruling] 23 Apr 2026, C-132/25 (M.M. Ristorazione) Type: Judgment - IP and other instruments > Enforcement Directive CURIA: https://curia.europa.eu/juris/liste.do?num=C-132/25
